scope: Bounded names and safety ceilings shared by the #1058 draft family. This file is not a wire schema, MOQT namespace registration, Privacy Pass token type, or codepoint allocation.

inner_control.note: This logical application label is carried only inside an encrypted ordinary Object payload; it is not a registered or mandatory MOQT track namespace.

transition_invariants: entitlement-checked and outer-session-ready are optional client states
outer-session-observed is an optional origin state
no outer-only state transitions to dispatch, plaintext, or key release
all state, binding, MAC, and audit checks succeed before spend-committed
spend-committed is durable and precedes dispatch or release-committed
any failed required check transitions to denied
unknown states, message kinds, versions, or transition events reject
